verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tears often fall on my face in sorrow And as I walk on through the long lonely nights Often I cry when it seems no one hears me Then through the shadows I can see the dawning of light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ohh soon this old life with all of its trials Will be left behind there's a new day a dawning The shadows of sin will vanish forever He promised me there's going to be joy in the morning

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tears cannot stain the pathways of glory No broken hearts we'll find up there Beyond that sky my mansions are waiting By the light of the morning We'll sing the songs of sweet victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ohh soon this old life with all of its trials Will be left behind there's a new day a dawning The shadows of sin will vanish forever He promised me there's going to be joy in the morning

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Ohh soon this old life with all of its trials Will be left behind there's a new day a dawning The shadows of sin will vanish forever He promised me there's going to be joy in the morning

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hold on my child joy comes in the morning Weeping only lasts for the night Hold on my child joy comes in the morning Ohh the darkest hour means dawn is just in sight

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hold on my child joy comes in the morning Weeping only lasts for the night Hold on my child joy comes in the morning Ohh the darkest hour means dawn is just in sight Ohh the darkest hour means dawn is just in sight Just in sight
